hero.subtitle: Computer Science & Business Systems Student combining technical problem-solving, product strategy, and leadership to build future-ready solutions.

about.heading: Bridging Code, Product, & Business
descriptionParagraphs: I am a Computer Science & Business Systems student with a unique academic path that combines technical engineering with business management methodologies. This dual training allows me to look at code through the lens of business value and product longevity.

Currently, I am working as a Software Intern exploring QNX-based Software Defined Vehicle systems. Learning real-time operating systems (RTOS) and studying how vehicle systems are transitioning to standardized software stacks has opened my eyes to the future of automotive IoT and embedded architectures.

My goal is to step into product leadership, taking product concepts from early user research and technical specification writing through design iterations in Figma, all the way to launch and go-to-market execution.
about.quote: Building technology is exciting, but building technology that aligns with commercial logic and solves core user problems is what truly drives change.

projectsList.title: AI Fraud Company Detection System
projectsList.description: Built a machine learning fraud detection platform to identify fake companies, fraudulent job ads, and online recruiter scams.
projectsList.problem: Fake job advertisements and fraudulent company listings exploit job seekers, leading to identity theft and financial scams. Tracking these fake entities manually at scale is inefficient.
projectsList.solution: Implemented an analysis dashboard running Python-based NLP models. We used TF-IDF vectorization to process text content, Naive Bayes for company categorization, and K-Means clustering to discover anomaly clusters and red flags.
projectsList.impact: Significantly improved detection rates of automated scam postings. Created a red-flag warning dashboard indicating high-risk attributes like vague descriptions, unverified emails, and suspicious domains.

projectsList.title: Amazon Prime Video 2.0
projectsList.description: Formulated a user retention strategy and feature roadmap targeting Gen Z audiences, introducing social features.
projectsList.problem: Stagnant engagement rates and user churn on Prime Video, particularly within the Gen Z demographic who prefer shared interactive media experiences rather than isolated streaming.
projectsList.solution: Designed 'PrimeSync' – a native, low-latency co-watching experience integrated with localized chat. Created a comprehensive product spec (PRD) detailing user stories, UX wireframes, and target launch milestones.
projectsList.impact: Defined core success metrics (e.g., Weekly Co-Watching Hours, Cohort Retention Rate, Feature Adoption Rate) to improve monthly active users (MAU) and session times.

projectsList.title: StayReal – Trust Every Stay
projectsList.description: Designed a traveler safety verification strategy and matching mechanism to solve vacation rental discrepancies.
projectsList.problem: Vacation rental bait-and-switch listings and photoshopped images cause extreme traveler distress and degrade platform booking confidence.
projectsList.solution: Conceptualized 'Reality Match Score™' - a verification mechanism utilizing spatial AI and metadata checks. Designed structured traveler safety certificates and listing compliance guidelines.
projectsList.impact: Reduced customer service disputes regarding listing differences, directly increasing return-booking metrics in simulations and testing prototypes.

projectsList.title: Scorptech Growth Strategy
projectsList.description: Constructed a 90-day growth and B2B client acquisition roadmap incorporating viral loop mechanisms.
projectsList.problem: Inefficient early-stage B2B marketing channels and high client acquisition costs preventing Scorptech from scaling its services.
projectsList.solution: Constructed a structured 90-day go-to-market plan featuring multi-channel email sequencing, a two-sided B2B referral system, and organic industry influencer partner networks.
projectsList.impact: Outlined a predictable outreach model detailing concrete weekly targets, acquisition cost estimates, and conversion funnel optimizations.
